infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Immortal reads HRV, sleep, resting heart rate, steps and workouts to compute readiness and make daily recommendations.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Immortal can log completed recovery sessions back to Apple Health so your rings and history stay in sync.
